subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The mirror revealing the world hath arrived - one cup of love, one cup of fellowship, one cup of remembrance and praise therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله مرآت جهان نما رسید یک جام محبت یک جام مودت یک جام ذکر و ثنا از آن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @nearness and remoteness
